flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Wake Technical Community College fell 46% between 2006 and 2009 (27.4% → 14.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Wake Technical Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Wake Technical Community College fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.9k → $6.9k).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Wake Technical Community College are 22% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($41.8k vs $34.1k).
